channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: SOL rallies as Solana memecoins, prediction market activity surge: Are bulls back?
item.description: Rising interest in Solana-network memecoins and prediction markets was followed by a rally in SOL price. Will the momentum continue?

item.title: Claude Fable 5 Isn't Nerfed. The Router Is Just Paranoid
item.description: Did Claude Fable 5 get dumber? Two benchmarks, two wildly different conclusions—and one routing layer that explains the whole mess.

item.title: Senator Gillibrand Seeks to Ban Trump, Elected Officials From Launching Meme Coins
item.description: After President Trump disclosed over $1 billion in crypto-related earnings, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand is calling for a meme coin ban.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: US senator calls for ban on elected officials issuing memecoins
item.description: The restriction proposed by Senator Kirsten Gillibrand would bar members of Congress, the US president and their spouses from “issuing or sponsoring their own digital assets.”

item.title: This sanctioned Russian stablecoin claims it processes billions, but blockchain analysts disagree
item.description: A7A5 claims crypto data providers understate its trading activity, while blockchain analytics firms say the ruble-backed token's volumes have fallen sharply this year.

item.title: Zcash Ironwood Upgrade Nears as Developers Work to Restore Confidence After ZEC Crash
item.description: Developers say security testing has uncovered no new serious bugs as Zcash's Ironwood upgrade moves toward testnet activation.

item.title: 🚨NEW: Following the release of President Trump’s financial disclosures, which showed more than $600 million in income from his $TRUMP memecoin in 2025, Senator @gillibrandny has renewed her call for ethics reforms that would prohibit the president, m - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9EV1BGRjZpRXhkdFJKV21rREs4RV9DS2NBODhWUW5WbnpEdlQ4Y1IzRm1TcEs5N2FmclFvWkJGVTJGVVkwcHhyZzA0RENnRmY1Ui02QnFzTDQtNlNIYjloeDl1MHVnZw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: Following the release…

item.title: 'Every Time I Buy It, It Tanks': Dave Portnoy Says He's Losing Millions as Bitcoin Falls
item.description: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy says he's down millions on Bitcoin, but he's intent on holding this time—even if it falls to zero.

item.title: Donald Trump says ‘nothing wrong’ with $1.4B crypto windfall while in office
item.description: The US President disclosed earning more than $1 billion from crypto ventures amid discussions of a digital asset market structure bill in Congress and legislation to ban CBDCs awaiting his desk.

item.title: ESMA warns many prediction market event contracts already face EU retail ban
item.description: The European regulator said companies cannot circumvent EU financial rules by marketing binary-style products as event contracts rather than derivatives.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Bitcoin maximalism meets the realities of capital markets
item.description: Strategy authorizes Bitcoin sales, Open USD takes on USDT and USDC, Fidelity defends Bitcoin security and crypto ramps up political spending for 2026.

item.title: What Is Q-Day? The Quantum Threat to Bitcoin Explained
item.description: Experts warn quantum computers could someday forge Bitcoin’s digital signatures, allowing unauthorized transactions.

item.title: Bitcoin price tags $62.3K nine-day high after global stocks hit historic record
item.description: Bitcoin set new highs for July after the Dow Jones and global stocks market cap set new all-time highs before the US Independence Day holiday.

item.title: American Charged in Israel With Spying for Iran in Exchange for Crypto
item.description: Israeli prosecutors charged a 21-year-old American man with spying for Iran while studying at a seminary in Jerusalem.

item.title: EU crypto rulebook faces enforcement challenge as MiCA transition ends
item.description: Lawyers and industry executives expect EU regulators to enforce MiCA differently as unauthorized crypto companies are required to wind down operations.

item.title: Brand, legal, political, technical, institutional, cultural, and physical power can influence Bitcoin debate, but not settle consensus. They exert second-order influence by persuading, coordinating, constraining, or mobilizing nodes, miners, and holders. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE11elVDU3NLSGE3MWotc0tIZjJra1IxcFFBRUwzOGlmT0F5b0J3ZVVUYk5zZU9ZUkJKUmtjcVBCeGthenJqUzd1NHFVUE9aUkMxTTByeGpRT1c4eDA?oc=5" target="_blank">Brand, legal, political, technical, institu…

item.title: Upbit says it only expressed interest in future OUSD participation
item.description: Upbit said it only expressed interest in potentially joining the OpenStandard ecosystem in the future, as several South Korean firms distanced themselves from the OUSD initiative.

item.title: Farage Reported to UK Standards Watchdog Over Alleged Crypto Lobbying
item.description: A Labour MP says the Reform leader pressed the Bank of England on policy that could enrich his biggest donor, a major Tether investor.

item.title: $61,843.69 #Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: $61,843.69 #Bitcoin

item.title: Belgian police arrest suspected phishing gang leader tied to $572K theft
item.description: Belgian authorities say a European phishing gang stole over $572,000 from victims before laundering the proceeds through cryptocurrency.

item.title: Trump says there is ‘nothing wrong’ with family’s crypto windfall
item.description: The president reported at least $1.4 billion in crypto income for 2025. He told CNBC he did nothing illegal and was not aware of the extent of his holdings. Critics say he is profiting from the office while his administration writes the in…

item.title: StanChart joins ESMA's first MiCA register update since deadline
item.description: ESMA publishes its first post-deadline MiCA register update, adding 37 crypto-asset service providers, including Standard Chartered and FalconX.

item.title: Nothing says crypto in America quite like going public on the @NYSE during the week of the Fourth of July. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9wcVU1WURBZHJ0NUswN0tkd0NSWmsxcEJnRWRPN2tJRU9IWWlCdmlSUlRMM0pJRXB2QUxLajZscjlIR1IzSDlVX3ZiTUp1T2JrQzhVM2FSaU9pc25Vc19xN1lZVUtZZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Nothing says crypto in Ameri…

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Draw In $222M, Snapping 10-Day Losing Streak
item.description: Thursday's inflows ended a run that drained $2.7 billion, but analysts warn one green day isn't necessarily a trend reversal.

item.title: Bitcoin whales bought $16.7 billion of bitcoin in 2 weeks even as ETFs bled a record $4 billion
item.description: U.S. institutional demand had its worst month ever in June. Large holders absorbed the selling, marking a divergence that has shown up near past cycle bottoms.

item.title: Africa's largest crypto exchange will power their core perps offering directly using Hyperliquid's onchain liquidity. This is a major milestone that will redefine how the next generation of financial applications are built. The breakthrough of cloud computing was th - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBrRzZUMWI5d2kxY0QxdlE3SFZKYWo0SUs4eGlqMXFJbWsxaUp1bWR1WWJuaDVVMi16OTlmQmhiSnBKak9Oa0VZU095ZEpnVFhvSXFrcV9OSHpVU0JmOTVJS0JyRE43Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">Africa's largest crypto exch…

item.title: Bitcoin supply metric prints first 'buy' signal since late 2022 as bear market continues
item.description: Bitcoin supply dynamics pointed toward the end of the 2026 bear market after the first "buy" signal since November 2022, but analysis warned that BTC price could still go lower.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether traders aren't fully buying the bounce, options markets show
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 3, 2026

item.title: Zcash’s Ironwood upgrade faces possible delay over infrastructure readiness
item.description: Shielded Labs said exchanges, mining pools and wallets may need more time to complete Zcash’s Z3 software migration and safely prepare for Ironwood.

item.title: Crypto bulls on firmer footing as U.S. rate-hike risk recedes
item.description: Crypto ended the week in a more buoyant state after weak U.S. jobs data reduced the chances of a Fed interest-rate increase and Uniswap gained on a link-up with Robinhood.

item.title: Defendant files to dismiss New York lawsuit seeking ownership of 39,069 Bitcoin wallets
item.description: A defendant who owns one of the dormant Bitcoin wallets filed to dismiss the New York case, which seeks ownership of $229 billion worth of Bitcoin considered lost.

item.title: Memory and semiconductor stocks lose momentum, bitcoin rebounds in sign of changing investor focus
item.description: After dominating markets in 2026, AI-tied memory and semiconductor stocks are losing momentum, raising the question whether capital will shift back into bitcoin.

item.title: Several Korean Companies Say They Have Not Formally Joined Open USD Alliance, Express Confusion Over Inclusion According to Chosun Biz, several Korean companies listed as Open USD (OUSD) alliance members, including Samsung Electronics, Dun - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBMY01uSG9DY2dGZm5Ud2xmX1Y2c2NULTV6RzFDRGhMZlZGWDY2ZWM0ZDhNOFJjbnY3TUsxelYzcEc4UjRXQnRaWDdFM05ZOGJfVkFLMjFUdHFjRnBNYTUxVTUtSQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Several Korean Companies Say The…

item.title: India's central bank revives push to isolate banks from crypto: Report
item.description: The Indian central bank reportedly urged lawmakers to keep banks insulated from crypto and private stablecoins while preserving room for regulated tokenization.

item.title: Tokenization could make finance faster, but also more susceptible to shocks, IMF says
item.description: Tokenization could make finance faster and cheaper. It also makes it more vulnerable to sudden shocks, the International Monetary Fund said.

item.title: Irish authorities seize another 500 Bitcoin, bringing 2026 total to 1,500 BTC
item.description: Irish authorities recovered 500 Bitcoin in criminal proceeds, bringing the total seized by the Criminal Assets Bureau to about $92 million in BTC for 2026.

item.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs top $200M in daily inflows for first time since May
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs post $221.7 million inflows, the strongest daily intake since early May, as Bitcoin recovers above $61,000.

item.title: Crypto looks very ready for one of the most hated rallies in a long time. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9jWXNweDE2TVdaRktLNmlEUDBtT0x5anUxZTNFaUNJMDdNVHZvRC1tTFJuN3lJX2JBZDJwOFJlR0xDRXUzNS1hZHRHS25jWmVVd3lCNlRfeVo0THBXaW9GSXN3?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto looks very ready for one of…

item.title: 🚨 LATEST: JPMorgan says Strategy's new Bitcoin sale policy introduces "avoidable" two-way risk into crypto markets. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFA0VzRKT19NTWw4c2VMMGtrT3c3R0pzWFlwWlk0WllGZmFjV2R3TGpVVkpaNmpuQW1GejRfakcydkQtSWQxTEhIR3AzMUEtT0lObHlyWVhraXcxc1FTYW54OGhxNTY?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 LATEST: JPMorgan says Strate…

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin rises above $62,000 as the red hot semiconductor trade starts to fade

I woke up briefly and saw some crypto person claiming that they could “retire me if I work with them,” which is neither true nor particularly palatable even if true. I wanted to quickly explain the situation I’m in. (Or rather was forced into.) First, this is a distraction fr - x.com

item.title: Binance says MiCA should be judged by who it licenses, not who it excludes
item.description: Europe head Gillian Lynch said Binance met Greece's licensing requirements and that the company remains committed to the EU, despite withdrawing its MiCA application days before the July 1 deadline.

item.title: Teen ‘Scattered Spider’ suspect extradited to US over $8M crypto ransom
item.description: Peter Stokes, 19, has been charged in the US for allegedly taking part in a hacking group’s unsuccessful $8 million crypto ransom scheme.

item.title: AI agent development hasn’t accelerated as expected, Zuckerberg says
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg’s comments came on the same day that Meta expanded its Meta Business Agent globally for businesses on Instagram, Messenger and WhatsApp.

item.title: Finally. $221 million flow into Bitcoin ETFs, ending a painful 10-day outflow streak
item.description: Spot ETFs had their strongest inflow day in two months, driven by funds other than BlackRock’s IBIT.

item.title: 🚨 UPDATE: Bitcoin tests $60K support as exchange inflows spike, signaling incoming volatility as whales reportedly lead the move, per CryptoQuant. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1rU281b2ZtWGl5NDhiMnR1WFJqVFlWSUo3cnh4eTkydEptenNITG9iSm42N2g4WFRpNTZUeWNxbHNNOThGT0lGNTFZN0NwVmRFdGtLbTNUelZ1bEJLc1JJb0tqd28?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 UPDATE: Bitcoin tests $60K s…

item.title: XRP bulls test path back toward $1.10 as token zips 4% higher
item.description: Buyers defended a higher low and pushed XRP toward near-term resistance, though the move still needs a clean break above $1.10 to confirm momentum.

item.title: Ether and solana extend gains as a short squeeze lifts bitcoin toward $62,000
item.description: Bearish traders lost $281 million in liquidations over 24 hours, nearly double the longs, as bitcoin pushed to its strongest level in two weeks. Ether is up almost 10% on the week and solana nearly 19% while a rebound in tech stocks eased …

item.title: US dominates Polymarket political bets despite geoblock: Report
item.description: New data from Allium suggests that US users are bypassing geoblocks to bet on markets offered on Polymarket’s global platform.

item.title: That same logic applies to Bitcoin as well. It’s getting closer to its power law support line. Again, I don’t see the catalyst yet for a reversal. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBvU2VrbkljUTR6NVl1VFZHcHA2eE8yQ1hkbHpBZFd3T3VSbThjTlZSNmFQbEl6QnlxTHBWRGZGdlNkemFWZzJOZzlqY0hrX2JHbWZaeVUxZmJ4TFdVR2lGX2FlcGU3dw?oc=5" target="_blank">That same logic applies to B…

item.title: OpenAI Offers US Government a $42 Billion Slice of Itself: Report
item.description: Sam Altman is pitching a 5% equity stake in OpenAI for the U.S. government—and reportedly wants every major AI company to do the same.

item.title: Russia Is Ready for 'Widespread Use' of Digital Ruble by September, Says Bank Governor
item.description: Bank of Russia Governor Elvira Nabiullina said major banks and retailers are on track to begin accepting the digital ruble by September 1.

item.title: Treasury Department Sanctions Over 130 ISIS-Affiliated Crypto Wallets on Tron
item.description: More than 130 Tron wallets connected with a Central Asian ISIS affiliate were sanctioned by the U.S. government, with funds frozen by Tether.

item.title: AI Researchers Got Chatbots to Share Cocaine Recipes Using This One Wild Trick
item.description: Researchers say a new jailbreak technique tricked AI models into treating attacker-written text as their own reasoning, bypassing safety guardrails and exposing a deeper security flaw.

item.title: Securitize tokenizes $295 million of its own stock on Solana and Avalanche amid NYSE debut
item.description: The newly-public company's shares are the largest issuer-sponsored tokenized stock at launch, aiming to make a point against rival third-party stock token issuers.

item.title: Securitize Begins Trading on NYSE as Tokenized Shares Land on Solana, Avalanche
item.description: BlackRock-backed tokenization firm Securitize now has shares trading on the New York Stock Exchange—or via Solana and Avalanche.

item.title: Japanese Financial Giant SBI to Shut Down Bitcoin Mining Pool
item.description: SBI Crypto, the subsidiary of the Japanese financial giant, is the latest firm to shutter its Bitcoin mining endeavor.

item.title: Crypto Shorts Get Rekt as Bitcoin, Ethereum and XRP Rise to Weekly High Prices
item.description: Bitcoin continued rising after hitting a 21-month-low earlier this week, topping $62,000 and leading a broader crypto market rebound.

item.title: EToro invests in onchain derivatives platform Extended as brokers race into DeFi
item.description: The broker plans to bring perpetual futures into Zengo wallet and expand DeFi products to its core platform as rivals like Robinhood expand onchain offerings.
